name: concurrency-model
summary: Cách handle concurrent work. Threads (Java/C), goroutines (Go), actors (Erlang), async/await (JS/Rust).

facts.text: shared memory: threads + locks. Race condition prone
CSP: communicate by channel, không share. Go
actor: isolated state, message passing. Erlang
async/await: single-threaded non-blocking. JS, Python asyncio
